query:
SELECT id, variantCode, variantName, customerSku, customerId, variantType 
FROM product_variants 
WHERE customerSku = 'CLIENT-SKU-ABC-001' 
  AND erpCompanyId = 1
  AND (variantType = 'universal' OR customerId = 30007)
LIMIT 10;

FROM product_variants 
WHERE customerSku = 'CLIENT-SKU-ABC-001' 
  AND erpCompanyId = 1
  AND (variantType = 'universal' OR customerId = 30007)
LIMIT 10;
